name: freqtrade-client

metadata.name: freqtrade-client
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3)

documentation:
# Freqtrade Client

# ![freqtrade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/freqtrade/freqtrade/develop/docs/assets/freqtrade_poweredby.svg)

Provides a minimal rest client for the freqtrade rest api.

Please check out the [main project](https://github.com/freqtrade/freqtrade) for more information or details.

functions.name: freqtrade_client.ft_client.main
documentation: Main entry point for the client

modules.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client
documentation:
A Rest Client for Freqtrade bot

Should not import anything from freqtrade,
so it can be used as a standalone script, and can be installed independently.

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.start
documentation:
Start the bot if it's in the stopped state.

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.stop
documentation:
Stop the bot. Use `start` to restart.

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.stopbuy
documentation:
Stop buying (but handle sells gracefully). Use `reload_config` to reset.

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.reload_config
documentation:
Reload configuration.

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.balance
documentation:
Get the account balance.

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.count
documentation:
Return the amount of open trades.

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.entries
documentation:
Returns List of dicts containing all Trades, based on buy tag performance
Can either be average for all pairs or a specific pair provided

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.exits
documentation:
Returns List of dicts containing all Trades, based on exit reason performance
Can either be average for all pairs or a specific pair provided

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.mix_tags
documentation:
Returns List of dicts containing all Trades, based on entry_tag + exit_reason performance
Can either be average for all pairs or a specific pair provided

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.locks
documentation:
Return current locks

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.delete_lock
documentation:
Delete (disable) lock from the database.

```
param lock_id

ID for the lock to delete

return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.lock_add
documentation:
Lock pair

```
param pair

Pair to lock

param until

Lock until this date (format "2024-03-30 16:00:00Z")

param side

Side to lock (long, short, *)

source:5: (WARNING/2) Inline emphasis start-string without end-string.

param reason

Reason for the lock

return

json object
```

Returns part of the configuration, relevant for trading operations.

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.ping
documentation: simple ping

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.logs
documentation:
Show latest logs.

```
param limit

Limits log messages to the last <limit> logs. No limit to get the entire log.

return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.trades
documentation:
Return trades history, sorted by id

```
param limit

Limits trades to the X last trades. Max 500 trades.

param offset

Offset by this amount of trades.

return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.trade
documentation:
Return specific trade

```
param trade_id

Specify which trade to get.

return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.delete_trade
documentation:
Delete trade from the database.
Tries to close open orders. Requires manual handling of this asset on the exchange.

```
param trade_id

Deletes the trade with this ID from the database.

return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.cancel_open_order
documentation:
Cancel open order for trade.

```
param trade_id

Cancels open orders for this trade.

return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.whitelist
documentation:
Show the current whitelist.

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.blacklist
documentation:
Show the current blacklist.

```
param add

List of coins to add (example: "BNB/BTC")

return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.forcebuy
documentation:
Buy an asset.

```
param pair

Pair to buy (ETH/BTC)

param price

Optional - price to buy

return

json object of the trade
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.forceenter
documentation:
Force entering a trade

```
param pair

Pair to buy (ETH/BTC)

param side

'long' or 'short'

param price

Optional - price to buy

param order_type

Optional keyword argument - 'limit' or 'market'

param stake_amount

Optional keyword argument - stake amount (as float)

param leverage

Optional keyword argument - leverage (as float)

param enter_tag

Optional keyword argument - entry tag (as string, default: 'force_enter')

return

json object of the trade
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.forceexit
documentation:
Force-exit a trade.

```
param tradeid

Id of the trade (can be received via status command)

param ordertype

Order type to use (must be market or limit)

param amount

Amount to sell. Full sell if not given

return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.strategies
documentation:
Lists available strategies

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.strategy
documentation:
Get strategy details

```
param strategy

Strategy class name

return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.pairlists_available
documentation:
Lists available pairlist providers

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.plot_config
documentation:
Return plot configuration if the strategy defines one.

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.available_pairs
documentation:
Return available pair (backtest data) based on timeframe / stake_currency selection

```
param timeframe

Only pairs with this timeframe available.

param stake_currency

Only pairs that include this timeframe

return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.pair_candles
documentation:
Return live dataframe for \<pair>\<timeframe>.

```
param pair

Pair to get data for

param timeframe

Only pairs with this timeframe available.

param limit

Limit result to the last n candles.

param columns

List of dataframe columns to return. Empty list will return OHLCV.

return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.pair_history
documentation:
Return historic, analyzed dataframe

```
param pair

Pair to get data for

param timeframe

Only pairs with this timeframe available.

param strategy

Strategy to analyze and get values for

param freqaimodel

FreqAI model to use for analysis

param timerange

Timerange to get data for (same format than --timerange endpoints)

return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.sysinfo
documentation:
Provides system information (CPU, RAM usage)

```
return

json object
```

methods.name: freqtrade_client.ft_rest_client.FtRestClient.health
documentation:
Provides a quick health check of the running bot.

```
return

json object
```
